Source URL: https://www.score.org/plan-start/

# SCORE Plan + Start Lifecycle Hub

Last reviewed for BOSS Library ingestion: 2026-06-21

## BOSS Library tags
score, plan-start, ideation, validation, formation, launch

## Resource purpose
Stage hub for starting a business, including startup readiness, validation, financial readiness, business planning, legal setup education, tax/accounting setup, and launch marketing.

## How the BOSS AI Librarian should use this resource
Use this as the main SCORE hub for early-stage entrepreneurs. It should usually be recommended before entity formation if the user still needs to clarify the concept, customer, business model, or startup requirements.

## Best-fit BOSS lifecycle stage
BOSS Phase 1 Ideation, Phase 2 Validation, Phase 3 Formation, and Phase 4 Launch.

## Route the user here when
The user is asking where to start, how to validate an idea, how to plan formation, how to create a business plan, how to understand startup costs, or how to get first customers.

## BOSS routing notes
- For BOSS, this hub maps strongly to Ideation through Launch.
- Sequence matters: readiness and validation before legal/entity/tax setup unless the user has already validated and is clearly forming.

## Related SCORE links
- Startup Roadmap: https://www.score.org/startup-roadmap/
- Am I Ready: https://www.score.org/am-i-ready/
- Market Research: https://www.score.org/market-research/
- Business Model Canvas Template: https://www.score.org/templates/business-model-canvas-template/

## Response pattern for BOSS
Use this resource as a routing destination, not as a substitute for professional legal, tax, lending, procurement, or compliance advice. For time-sensitive workshops, deadlines, prices, contact details, or eligibility rules, send the user to the live source URL first.
